Vector - Class in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math
This class represents a vector consisting of 2 or 3 coordinates.
Vector2D - Class in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math
This class is a 2 dimensional subclass of the Vector.
Vector2D(int, int) - Constructor for class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector2D
Instantiates a new vector2 d.
Vector2D(double, double) - Constructor for class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector2D
Instantiates a new vector2 d.
Vector2D(double, double, int) - Constructor for class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector2D
Instantiates a new vector2 d.
Vector3D - Class in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math
This class is a 3 dimensional subclass of the Vector.
Vector3D(int, int, int) - Constructor for class net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector3D
Instantiates a new vector3 d.
